blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by prerequisite UI interaction failure in browser validation: despite repeated canvas clicks on '新的旅程' and class selection targets, the session never reliably progressed from the menu into a controllable gameplay state, so the dungeon portal and multi-run procedural floor generation could not be exercised through the user surface.

Blocked by the same prerequisite browser UX issue preventing entry into gameplay; unable to reach dungeon floors to compare floor-1 vs floor-5 monster scaling, floor monster variety, or applied difficulty modifiers through the real user surface.
Blocked by inability to traverse from menu into a playable zone in browser validation, so dungeon boss encounters and guaranteed boss loot could not be validated via the real UI flow.
Blocked by prerequisite browser interaction failure before dungeon entry; could not verify exiting/re-entering, fresh run generation, or save/reload return-to-entrance behavior from the user surface.

Blocked because the required progression prerequisite (clearing Normal) could not be achieved from a fresh browser session due to the same menu-to-game interaction problem; therefore Nightmare/Hell unlock sequencing and persistence could not be confirmed in-browser.
Blocked by inability to enter a live run and compare the same monster across Normal, Nightmare, and Hell through the browser surface; no in-surface combat state was reached for measurement.

Code-level evidence indicates the intended behavior is to send save/load back to the Abyss Rift entrance rather than persist an in-progress dungeon position, but there is no reliable browser execution evidence for an actual save/load cycle from floor 3+ through the user surface in this validation round.

Local code and tests support that the final dungeon floor is configured to spawn a named Chinese boss with boss skills and elevated stats, but no trustworthy user-surface run reached the final floor to observe the encounter, HP presentation, or skill use in-browser.

The dungeon generation logic and tests indicate mid-boss floors on every third non-final floor in longer runs, but there is no real browser traversal evidence showing a 7+ floor run with a visible mid-boss encounter on a non-final floor.

Boss and mid-boss loot guarantees are strongly supported by code and automated tests, including rare+ and magic+ quality floors, but no browser-based kill-and-loot collection evidence was produced from the user surface, so this assertion remains blocked for user-testing synthesis.

MenuScene, DifficultySystem, and tests support a Chinese difficulty selector that appears after Normal completion or for migrated non-normal saves, but there is no reliable user-surface evidence of actually clearing Normal and then seeing the Nightmare option appear in the browser flow during this validation round.

deferralNote: The 11 blocked endgame assertions (VAL-END-001 through VAL-END-010, VAL-END-012) have been deferred to the visual-polish milestone cross-area-integration feature for re-validation. They were blocked by prerequisite browser UI interaction failures preventing menu-to-game progression, not by implementation defects. VAL-CROSS-013 (save migration) was also moved to cross-area-integration.
